items.text:
🎬 Zweiter Organisator / Produktionshilfe gesucht (Raum Salzburg)
Hey zusammen,

ich plane aktuell einen Filmdreh im Raum Salzburg und übernehme die Hauptorganisation.

Ich suche noch eine zuverlässige Person, die mich bei der Organisation unterstützt (z. B. Planung, Kommunikation mit Team, Ablauf am Drehtag).

💡 Wichtig: Das Projekt ist aktuell unbezahlt, dafür bekommst du Erfahrung, Einblick in ein Filmprojekt und Credits.

Wenn du motiviert bist und Lust hast mitzuhelfen, melde dich gern 👍

items.text:
✨ OPEN AUDITIONS – NEW LOCAL YOUTH PRODUCTION ✨
📍 BASED IN MOUNTSORREL, LEICESTERSHIRE 📍

Hi everyone! 👋 I’m so excited to announce I am launching a brand new youth performance group right here in our local community, and auditions are now OPEN! 🎭🎶

🎭 **A BIT ABOUT ME**
My name is Sam and I am 17 and currently studying a Musical Theatre course at a Performing Arts College. I have a huge passion for all things performance - acting, singing, dancing and choreography are what I love most! 🩰✨

I am extremely hard-working and dedicated; I achieved top grades across ALL my GCSE subjects, so you can be sure this project will be organised, professional and run to a high standard 📚✅

I will be leading, directing, choreographing AND performing alongside you - bringing everything I have learnt and experienced to make this something truly special for all of us! 🫶

💡 **WHAT ARE WE DOING?**
We are creating a magical, high-energy festive show for Christmas/Winter 2026 🎄❄️

We haven’t decided the exact show yet – 
**YOU get a say too!** We will choose together between:
• 🎭 A classic Pantomime (e.g. Cinderella, Aladdin, Snow White – all the favourites!)
• 🎶 *Nativity! The Musical* – fun, chaotic, energetic and everyone knows & loves it!
• 💬 …OR suggest your own ideas! All welcome 📝

This will include acting, singing, dancing and cheer-style choreography – something for everyone!

👥 **WHO IS THIS FOR?**
Open to ages **14 – 21** roughly anyway but open to all for auditions
Perfect for:
✅ Students / college students
✅ Anyone who loves acting, singing or dancing
✅ Cheerleaders / dance students
✅ Beginners AND those with experience – **NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED!** You just need enthusiasm, commitment and a love for performing ✨

🗓️ **REHEARSAL SCHEDULE**
✅ **STARTS MID/END SEPTEMBER 2026**
✅ ** LIKELY EVERY SATURDAY Time TBC / venue TBC but likely Mountsorrel Methodist Hall / local community centre – all central, easy access 📍

💻 **PLUS:** Occasional short Zoom sessions (weekday evenings, every 2–3 weeks)
→ Used only to run lines, sing together or check progress – **flexible, low-pressure
Great for fitting around college / work / other activities 📱

🎬 **PERFORMANCES:**
✨ **LATE DECEMBER 2026 OR EARLY JANUARY 2027** ✨
*(depending on when we can hire a venue for the show and We vote as a team! January means extra time to polish everything perfectly – less rush, better result!)
📍 **Show Venue:** likely Mountsorrel Memorial Centre (MMC) Theatre** – proper stage, lighting & sound – professional experience! 🎭

💸 **COSTS**
There is a small participation fee of £25 – £30 per person per month
⚠️ **100% TRANSPARENT – NO HIDDEN COSTS:**
This money ONLY covers rehearsal venue hire, show venue hire, scripts, music, props, production materials and admin.
👉 **I DO NOT PROFIT FROM THIS** – I am directing, choreographing and performing alongside you completely for free! Everything goes straight into making our show the best it can be ✅

✨ **ROLES AVAILABLE**
• Lead acting / speaking roles
• Solo / group singing parts
• Featured dance / cheer roles
• Ensemble / Chorus – *everyone gets plenty of stage time!*
• Also looking for 1–2 people interested in helping with creative / assistant work alongside me!

📩 **HOW TO APPLY / BOOK AN AUDITION**
👉 Comment ‘INTERESTED’ below
👉 I will then send u a private message on Facebook or instagram, whichever u prefer, (just let me know ur user if it’s instagram)
👉I will then create a group with all prepped interested to dicuss it further
👉any questions regarding auditions ect plz email samg56811@gmail.com

Auditions will be held via self tapes anytime from now till end of July. Email me if u want more details on this

Come join me – let’s make theatre magic right here in our local area! 🎶🩰✨

Please share with anyone you think might be interested! 📢💛

#Mountsorrel #Charnwood #Loughborough #YouthTheatre #PerformingArts #MusicalTheatre #Panto2026 #NativityMusical #LeicestershireEvents #StudentProject

items.text:
🚨 **URGENT CASTING CALL – FILMING TOMORROW (MONDAY 8TH JUNE) – PAID ROLE** 🚨

Due to a last-minute illness, Cherrywood Productions is urgently seeking **a female performer of African heritage, with Nigerian heritage especially welcomed,** for a featured role in a professionally produced historical music video filming **tomorrow in Chatham, Kent**.

🎬 **Featured on-screen role**
💷 **£175 (inclusive of travel)**
🍔 Food and refreshments provided
👗 Costume and makeup supplied
📍 The Command House, Chatham
📅 Monday 8th June 2026

The production is inspired by historical events in 1937 Lagos and we're keen to cast someone who can authentically represent the setting and characters portrayed.

No dialogue is required, but confidence in front of the camera would be an advantage.

If you or someone you know might be interested and available at short notice, please get in touch with me ASAP by DM or call/text **07857 283005**.

Please share this post—it could help us find the perfect person for an exciting project at the last minute!

🎬 Simon Burridge
Cherrywood Productions

#KentActors #CastingCall #NigerianActors #AfricanActorsUK #Chatham #FilmCasting #PaidActingRole

items.text:
Casting Call
Hi, I am the sole creator of a horror analogue series called The Haven Archivist. I am looking for 3 male actors and 1 female actress to fill certain characters. Project details: any scripts sent need to be filmed in a self tape format, project is unpaid 

Characters: 

Subject 7714 (Finch). Male, early 20s

Nigel Harrow. Current version of the main antagonist, late 40s

Kerion Marsh, brother of a missing journalist, late 20s to early 30s

Marian Scargill, director of Haven in the 90s, female, age late 30s to 40s

Please email me at Thehollowreturn@outlook.com if interested

topComments.text: Hi Grace Thomas I’ve added you as a friend so I can ask some questions through messenger.. if you prefer just email let me know and I’ll send you one. Thanks
IMBD credited? Paid? Location? Feature film?

items.text:
🎬 EXTRAS WANTED – PROJECT 79

We are looking for paid background artists for an exciting night shoot taking place on 28th & 29th June 2026.

📍 Filming Location: Stoke-on-Trent
🚌 Transport: Provided from Birmingham
👥 Ages: 18–50
🌍 Ethnicity: White/Caucasian males and females
🌙 Night Shoot
💰 Paid role

Please specify whether you are available on 28th June, 29th June, or both dates.

📩 To apply, send us a DM on Instagram (@bena.entertainment) or email us at benaentertainmenthouse@gmail.com with:

• Recent full-length solo photos
• Your full name
• Contact number
• Your availability for the listed dates
• Your travel plan (Birmingham pickup or self-drive)

Feel free to share this opportunity with anyone who may be interested!

sharedPost.text:
📢 WANT TO FEATURE YOUR CASTING CALL ON OUR MAIN PAGE? 🎬

Did you know you can get your project featured directly by Casting Calls UK?

While our Facebook Group is a fantastic place for the community to post breakdowns, we love giving an extra push for your projects right here on our main Profile Page for that bonus reach and visibility.

If you want us to feature your casting call on our main page, we can post it for you! Just send us an email with all the relevant information.

✉️ What to include in your email:
To help us get your post up quickly, please make sure to include:

The Poster / Artwork
Project Location (audition & shoot locations)
Fee / Compensation Details
Full Casting Brief (character breakdowns and requirements)

Application Instructions (how talent should apply)

📩 Send your details to: info@castingcalls.uk
👉 Subject Line: Main Page Casting Request - [Your Project Name]

Looking for roles instead? Skip the scroll and get your portfolio directly in front of industry members by setting up your official profile today!

👉 https://appcastingcalls.uk/

#CastingCallsUK #CCUK #UKCasting #UKActors #CastingDirector #FilmmakersUK

items.title: Last Minute Casting

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM | STASZÓW, WOJEWÓDZTWO ŚWIĘTOKRZYSKIE

We have an idea we are completely obsessed with — and we need the right people to help us bring it to life.

This is a short dramatic film made on a micro budget, the kind of project that makes you forget what it cost to make it. We believe in this story with everything we have, and we are building something that will make people stop and watch. Our goal is to submit to European film festivals.

📋 ROLES WE ARE CASTING:

👦 Boy — aged 4 to 7 (lead role)

👩 Woman — aged 25 to 33 (lead role)

👨 Man — aged 30 to 45 (lead role)

🎭 ABOUT THE PROJECT:

A short dramatic film — emotional, raw, and character-driven. A story about family, secrets, and discovery. We are obsessed with every detail of this project and that obsession will show on screen.

⭐ American accent preferred for all roles — but if you feel strongly about the project, reach out anyway.

📍 LOCATION: Staszów, Województwo Świętokrzyskie, Poland

🎥 SHOOT: 2 to 3 days total

💰 COMPENSATION: This is a passion project with no financial compensation. What we offer is a high-quality short film for your reel, full credit, and the chance to be part of something we truly believe will turn heads on the festival circuit. 

📩 Interested? Send me a direct message here on Facebook. I'd love to hear from you.

items.text:
With a month to go, join us on THE residential summer course for stage and screen combat!

Whether you're a newcomer needing your skills for period drama or panto, or a fight performers wanting specific skills as you do live events or SPACT work, this one has something for you.

A week learning the skills and choreography in three weapons, qualifying with an exam underwritten by ACTT Stage Combat, one of the 5 examination bodies recognised by Equity and Spotlight.

All bed and board covered, three meals a day, an free evening workshops in supporting skills too - rigging, martial arts, and more!

https://www.swordandscoundrel.co.uk/event-details/the-summer-course 

Book here!

CASTING HORSE RACING FRIENDS 🏇

Anna McAuley Casting is seeking Northern friends and couples who love to go to the races for a biscuit brand commercial.

We’re specifically looking for: friends and couples who love to attend horse racing like The Grand National.

Filming: 22 / 23 / 24 July (Manchester)
Paid opportunity.

Applicants to be based in Manchester, Leeds, Liverpool and surrounding areas. No previous acting experience needed.

Please apply with full name, location, 
selfie, full length shot and a short written intro to: hello@mcauleycasting.com with the subject: ‘Biscuit Commercial - Race Friends’

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL - Lead Actress for short film "CONCEPTION"
We're looking for our Ellie.

"Conception" is a two-hander drama/sci-fi/horror - one location, one intense relationship, a lot of room for a great performance. Directed by Darren Henderson, produced by myself.

THE ROLE
Acting age 30–35
Ideally (but not exclusively) based in the North West of England
Comfortable with screen acting and playing nuanced, layered characters

THE SHOOT
3 consecutive days between 3–13 September (dates flexible to the right actress)
Filming in Lancaster

A bit of honesty about the project: this is a collaborative passion project. The role is unpaid, but we cover travel, accommodation where it's needed, and food on set. Our producer and crew are experienced - not first-timers - and we already have a fantastic male co-lead attached. Our aim is a calm, supportive set and genuinely strong showreel material, especially for actresses who've built up supporting credits and are ready to carry a lead.

We know paid-only is the right call for a lot of people, and that's completely fair - if it's not for you, no worries at all. If it sounds like your kind of thing, we'd love to hear from you.

📩 To apply, email: darren.a.henderson27@gmail.com

We look forward to hearing from you.

Hiring – Art Director / Production Designer

Kentwood Films International is looking for a talented and creative Art Director / Production Designer for an upcoming independent feature film shooting in Chicago and surrounding suburbs.

We are specifically seeking experienced professionals based in the Chicago area.

Position: Art Director / Production Designer

Compensation: This is a paid position (compensation based on experience)

To Apply: Please send your portfolio, resume, and/or previous work samples to: kentwoodcinemas@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is now casting for a commercial that is filming in the Cleveland, OH area TWO DAYS from July 29th - 30th.
**IMPORTANT NOTE: This is a two day shoot, talent will need to be available for BOTH DAYS.**

DETAILS:
- Project: 'Alpha Aromatics' Commercial
- Filming Location: Cleveland, OH Area (Likely West Side or Lakefront)
- Shoot Date(s): 7/29 & 7/30 (Talent will work BOTH DAYS)
- Rate: $1000 plus 20% per day, guarantee 2 days.
- Usage: Web, social (TikTok, Instagram), and Amazon listings. Full buyout. Lifestyle how-to and product videos, plus stills, for two diffusers

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

OLDER WOMAN:
- Age: 60's-70's
- Gender: Female
- Ethnicity: ANY

YOUNG ADULT:
- Age: 20-35
- Gender: Female
- Ethnicity: Hispanic/LatinX

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:
In order to submit for this project, you will need to film a self-tape reading the from sides linked below. Please send your video to team@angelaboehmcasting.com. 

SUBJECT LINE: "Alpha Aromatics Submission - YOUR NAME"

Audition Directions:
- Please do not tape outside
- Please have a blank background
- Please put slates at the end of the audition.
- Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!
- DEADLINE: EOD Friday, 6.26

CLICK HERE FOR THE AUDITION SIDES: https://bit.ly/ABCAASides

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team
PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

Hello 
I am manager of pulsar show - Margo 

https://www.instagram.com/pulsarshow?igsh=MWMxaTZzNThvbXoxeA== 

Pulsar Theater specializes in professional light and fire shows, offering visually striking performances that enhance events of any scale and format.
Our capabilities include:
 • A wide range of show programs and performance formats
 • Original choreography of  contemporary dance by Veronica Salamatina , tailored to your technical requirements. 

https://www.instagram.com/v_e_r_o_n_i_k_a__s?igsh=dzE4MXFnOHJyeTR2

 We look forward to the opportunity to collaborate with you. 
Best regards,
Pulsar Theater Team

*The gift we give actors they give back to us tenfold. Claim this**[ FREE ONCE A YEAR OPPORTUNITY FOR ACTORS](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR1jBMysRByB2XoevczFwjG5ZLyCrdKodw1vfBtqGUq9mr_WZnrHj6o_nvo) **to help you book leads in series and films year after year! Do not miss this free class to create the 2024 of your dreams.*

You know how terrible things come in threes? I bet you do and I sure do. 13 years ago I was coaching high profile actors ([you’d know their names](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR1GBUt1dxQ5NDEEW4KNG3MN4rC6qKX3dgBNZOIHAb228X3q3FjHS-XwV-M&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)) but I was in a third degree burn kind of low spot - no friends, no family and definitely no fortune.

***Suddenly, I realized something life changing and [TRUE.](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.screenactingschool.com%2Ftrue-webinar-registration-page-1%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR29qUK0xzKYBGHDsU2Pu0lPI7Ym4H24-QzhFQfCYy2KhnoNoEHvge-1wgM&h=AT1NZrQlLntMatxZYQ0EVe1b0PDsXR3117L-ft-R87Myr8Kw5y6nyRZVBgqZBqO8bofBlenG05hGTNgz9SukPTpY_Duu8bMXokWB5CgdS8SGp95YVacWQsWSGbJEFqFG9gRYk62Ke2Gor8gEb_c-ld5zYQ&__tn__=-U-U-UK-R&c[0]=AT1QMFolJHTw0eDLxxcH9XqPOFU_22-xWW-M5xngsuW_lraCXblcF9okU_1c5JNm-fSoW0tdOQHiT7Hm3BtUlOew1ELxiP7Sn4DImb4NYk8VeMwDZKTCDtq5HOTzEVPA2Yz2bjj_EmkWVQbbRWC7uxGcabx6N9s6WA4z-uAGPAZHLO6UYDCX4cE_i2DBMmo8YH7eEsL9n1mNmf8tKGJM4LwFufRbdwLQpO8)***

***[Click here to claim this rare opportunity to create the 2024 of your dreams.](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR3XQox_pzy-I28fvyp-uOSjjNWG0rCY08DPy7R0k4jlyxQ38NXFD3155v4)***

***[https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR0Wcu7Vg6sw8qo5npU-DIcmeOg1jrqpgZJhvpi38cKu-HoeDWyvoVKJrhg](https://www.screenactingschool.com/true-webinar-registration-page-1?fbclid=IwAR2BreQ_l2Zk6Rw3ZsxIAS-J14CDEiMaEnFDjczrOoxMdxKb16caLmpcDGE)***

items.text:
**You're getting auditions.**

**People tell you you're talented.**

**So why aren't you booking?**

Here's something we wish more actors knew:

You can be incredibly talented and still not book.

Those things are not mutually exclusive.

In this free class replay, we break down the five things that stop great actors from booking and the simple fixes that make auditions feel more truthful, connected, and memorable.

Because the problem usually isn't talent.

**It's that nobody ever taught you how casting actually experiences an audition.**

🎥 Watch the replay now:

[https://youtu.be/7aGQgp8Pbzk?si=yK3iZXxGNJSEHM0N](https://youtu.be/7aGQgp8Pbzk?si=yK3iZXxGNJSEHM0N)

If you've ever wondered, "What am I missing?" This class is for you.

items.text:
Turn VO Auditions Into Bookings

Marc Graue’s audition techniques focus on making strong, authentic choices, bringing scripts to life, and standing out in a crowded marketplace. His animation character training helps actors create memorable, believable characters with unique voices, personalities, and emotional depth—skills that can elevate both auditions and bookings

items.text:
🚨 CASTING NOW: TikTok LIVE Dating Show (London) 🚨

I’m looking for 16 people to take part in a live dating show on TikTok 👀

📍 Location: London / Broadway Market (Hackney) — in person
⏱ Duration: 3 hours total
• 1 hour offline
• 2 hours live on TikTok

📅 Date: Monday, 6th July (evening)
💵 Paid opportunity: £100 + travel per contestant

We are looking for:
🇬🇧 UK-based singles
🇺🇸 US citizens currently living in or near London

✨ Requirements:
– 18+ only
– Comfortable appearing on TikTok Live
– Based in/near London
– Fun, confident, and up for a laugh

💬 No experience needed — just personality.

👉 To apply: DM me as soon as possible
⚡ Limited spots available — first come, first considered

Exact location and time slot will be confirmed with selected participants.

topComments.text: I’m so interested, sent you a DM
I did just send you a private message.

items.text:
*MODELS WANTED: for a last-minute photoshoot in Camden tomorrow afternoon.*

We’re putting together a small-scale lifestyle shoot featuring fresh salads, iced teas, and plenty of vibrant food photography, alongside natural, candid shots of cool Gen Z faces enjoying the experience.

The shoot will be relaxed, fun, and informal, with no professional modelling experience required. We're looking for people who are comfortable in front of the camera and can bring a friendly, authentic energy to the images.

In return for your time, you'll receive the full set of digital images from the shoot and a £50 gift card.

Message if interested! 

Feel free to share with anyone who might be a good fit. 📸🥗🧋

topComments.text: Yes I got two teenagers . One boy and one girl . Ages 14 and 16 both are interested .

items.text:
Hey everyone! 
I'm currently developing a true story, low-budget psychological thriller feature and am looking for an actress (playing age around 20) to take on the lead role.

❗️ I'm really only looking to hear from actresses who also want to get involved on the producing side in some capacity❗️

She’s a fantastic, very complex character with a lot to sink your teeth into. 

If you’re interested, or you'd just like to connect, email me at boundsfilms@gmail.com
Looking forward to connecting!!

items.text:
Hi everyone,
Larius Productions are looking for 2 actors and an actress for their next production at the Bread and Roses theatre for a weeks run in  November. Profit share. This is a fun play with a degree of adult content surrounding relationships. So please keep this in mind when applying.

Characters of

 Edward (lawyer) An extroverted, aggressive, and somewhat sleazy criminal defense lawyer.playing age  35 to 45. Must have height  min  5ft 10

George  well-meaning but somewhat nerdy and controlling academic who teaches political philosophy. Playing age 35 to 45. must have  height min 5ft 10

Lydia, A kind-hearted but betrayed woman with a hardened exterior. Andrew’s fiancée and Edward’s ex-girlfriend. Playing age 35 to 45

Please email sonya_namik@yahoo.co.uk with submissions.. headshot, and spotlight link.

items.title: Hi everyone,

items.text:
Szukamy statystów do projektu filmowego w Łodzi! 🎬🎥 [18+]

Hej Łódź! Tworzymy ciekawy, niezależny projekt filmowy (non-profit) i szukamy pełnoletnich osób (18+), które zasilą nasz plan jako statyści. Nie musisz mieć doświadczenia – liczą się chęci i dobra energia! 👊

Możesz wpaść do nas na jeden, dwa lub wszystkie trzy dni.
Kiedy nagrywamy?

 📍 01.07 (środa) | godz. 21:00 - 23:30 (klimat nocny 🌙)
 📍 03.07 (piątek) | godz. 04:00 - 07:00 (o świcie 🌅)
 📍 08.07 (środa) | godz. 09:00 - 13:00 (poranek ☀️)

Miejsce: Łódź

Chcesz przeżyć przygodę na planie, zobaczyć od kuchni jak kręci się film i poznać ekipę? Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/zainteresowana, napisz w komentarzu lub wyślij mi na maila aberrationofficial.vl@gmail.com swój numer telefonu.

Dodamy Cię do grupy statystów na WhatsAppie, gdzie dogrywamy wszystkie szczegóły! 📱✨

items.text:
Do lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról: 

1. Arek (18) – pogodny 18-latek spragniony przygód.   

Daty: 06 i 10.07
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

2. Kumpel (18) – dobry kolega Arka. Trochę nerd (może być w okularach)

Data: 06.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Łysy (29) – Chłopak Dagmary, wiecznie o nią zazdrosny. Typ osiedlowego drecha, przemocowca. Wybuchowy. [Jest łysy].  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!

Data: 07.07 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

4. Bramkarz (37) – bramkarz pracujący w klubie. Stara się dobrze wykonywać swoją robotę. Jest otwarty na współpracę z policją. Dobra sylwetka.

Data: 07.07 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

5. Diler (37) – Gość załatwia towar mniejszym dilerom. Zgrywa twardziela.

Data: 07.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

6. Iwan (39) – niebezpieczny gangster powiązany z poznańską mafią narkotykową. [Postać pojawia się ponownie w tym sezonie] KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY!!!

Data: 07.07
Stawka: 500 zl netto / 532

7. Radosław Domagała (39) – materialista i cwaniak, dla pieniędzy dał się wciągnąć w gangsterkę. Dobra sylwetka.

Data: 06.07
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

8.Andrzej (44) –  tata Arka. Facet z zasadami, umysł inżyniera. Oddany rodzinie.

Data: 06.07 i. 10.07
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

Poszukujemy kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 25–40 lat – dobrze wyglądających, wesołych i pełnych energii.

items.text:
LADBible Casting!

I'm looking for genuine, die-hard football fans aged 18+ with a strong story to back why. Examples such as running a community football group, or events, maybe you missed a special lifetime event to attend a match, couples who have attended matches together for over 40+ years etc. All unique stories welcome. These are for shoots taking place in London, Manchester, Liverpool and Birmingham throughout June and each participant will receive a fee of £2000 for participation. For more information please email erica.stein@ladbiblegroup.com

items.text:
***** IT'S TOMORROW *****

Remember: networking is an essential component of building your career!

Don't miss this opportunity to engage in inspiring conversations with a diverse array of industry professionals—brilliant actors, visionary directors, influential producers, and skilled crew members.

Event Details

* Date: Sunday, 28th June 2026

* Location: HOME Mcr- 2 Tony Wilson Pl, Manchester M15 4FN

* Time: 2:00 PM – 6:30 PM

* Tickets and Further Details: Available here –

 https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/actors-and-filmmakers-networking-event-tickets-1983730891497

Bring your enthusiasm, meet new collaborators, and expand your professional network.

items.text:
Hey everyone!
I'm currently developing a true story, low-budget psychological thriller feature and am looking for an actress/producer (playing age 20) to take on the lead role.

I'm really only looking to hear from actresses who also want to get involved on the producing side in some capacity. 

She’s a fantastic, very complex character with a lot to sink your teeth into. 

If you’re interested, or you'd just like to connect, email me at boundsfilms@gmail.com
Looking forward to connecting!!

items.title: Hey everyone!

items.text:
❗AKTOR REKLAMOWY POSZUKIWANY ❗

Szukamy charyzmatycznego aktora/prezentera do pełnienia roli tzw. “twarzy” elektromarketu na TikToku i Instagramie.

💡Zależy nam na aktorze/modelu, który:
* ma świetną charyzmę,
* ma postawną budowę ciała,
* jest w wieku 25-45 lat
* ma oryginalną mimikę, styl mówienia, wygląd (coś wyróżniającego jest mile widziane!),,
* ma dystans do siebie i poczucie humoru,
* komfortowo czuje się przed kamerą,
* przebywa w Warszawie (lub nie ma problemu z dojazdem na własny koszt)
* jest dostępny w lipcu.

📩 Jeśli czujesz, że to o Tobie, to  koniecznie prześlij zgłoszenie mailowo na adres: ** casting@kolektywkreatywny.pl **
(kontakt wyłącznie mailowy)

➡️ Co powinno zawierać zgłoszenie?
* Podstawowe dane oraz wymiary.
* Portfolio, czy inne materiały, które pokazują Twoje skille (koniecznie w wirtualnej formie, bez konieczności pobierania).
* Proponowana wycena Twojej pracy za dzień zdjęciowy

Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

* jest w wieku 25-45 lat
* ma oryginalną mimikę, styl mówienia, wygląd (coś wyróżniającego jest mile widziane!),,
* ma dystans do siebie i poczucie humoru,
* komfortowo czuje się przed kamerą,
* przebywa w Warszawie (lub nie ma problemu z dojazdem na własny koszt)
* jest dostępny w lipcu.

📩 Jeśli czujesz, że to o Tobie, to  koniecznie prześlij zgłoszenie mailowo na adres: ** casting@kolektywkreatywny.pl **
(kontakt wyłącznie mailowy)

➡️ Co powinno zawierać zgłoszenie?
* Podstawowe dane oraz wymiary.
* Portfolio, czy inne materiały, które pokazują Twoje skille (koniecznie w wirtualnej formie, bez konieczności pobierania).
* Proponowana wycena Twojej pracy za dzień zdjęciowy

Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
WROCŁAW 

Do naszego autorskiego filmu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy aktorów do głównych ról.

Projekt to **folkowy thriller osadzony w słowiańskich klimatach** pełen mroku, muzyki, tańca ludowego i teatralnej atmosfery. W filmie ważną rolę odgrywa zespół ludowy, rytuał oraz cielesność opowiadana poprzez ruch.

**ŁUKASZ (27)**
Szukamy aktora o wyrazistej obecności ekranowej, który potrafi połączyć pewność siebie i charyzmę z ukrytą wrażliwością. To postać, która stopniowo otwiera się na drugiego człowieka i pozwala sobie na bliskość. Doświadczenie taneczne lub swoboda w pracy z ruchem będą dużym atutem

**LENA (25)**

Szukamy aktorki o wyrazistej obecności ekranowej, która odnajdzie się w postaci pełnej sprzeczności: silnej, chłodnej i niedostępnej, a jednocześnie stopniowo odkrywającej swoją wrażliwość. Doświadczenie taneczne lub swoboda w pracy z ruchem będą dużym atutem.

📍 **Zdjęcia:** 30.07–02.08 we Wrocławiu i okolicach
🎬 Projekt realizowany jest **non-profit**, z myślą o zgłoszeniach festiwalowych.

📩 Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o przesłanie wizytówki aktorskiej (lub krótkiego nagrania przedstawiającego) na adres:
**klapokthemovie@wp.pl**

W tytule wiadomości prosimy wpisać:
**„ŁUKASZ – zgłoszenie”** lub **„LENA – zgłoszenie”**

topComments.text: Rozumiem, że aktorzy powinni mieć wskazany wiek i osoby starsze które wyglądają młodo nie wchodzą w grę?

attachments.ocrText: Może być zdjęciem przedstawiającym taniec

items.text:
Do lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról: 

1. Dagmara Stypa (21) – typ „paniusi” w tipsach. Robi na złość swojemu facetowi, chcąc wywołać w nim zazdrość. Ubiera się wyzywająco, tandetnie.

Data: 07.07 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Barbara Kucharska (41) –  mama 18- latka. Przerażona losem syna.

Data: 10.07
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

3. Krystyna (47) – Przed laty zmarł jej 18-letni syn. Do dziś się z tym nie pogodziła. Żyje wyimaginowaną zemstą. Stroni od ludzi, popada w obłęd. Nie dba o wygląd ani ubiór.  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!

Data: 06.07
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

4. Sąsiadka (51) – gaduła i plotkara. Chciałaby wszystko wiedzieć.

Data: 07.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
📍 WARSZAWA | 20–22 lipca
Film dyplomowy | non-profit
Poszukujemy aktorów do następujących ról:

MATYLDA (11–15 lat) – główna rola Nieśmiała, spokojna dziewczyna zamknięta w swoim świecie. Rola bez kwestii dialogowych, oparta przede wszystkim na ekspresji i fizyczności.

OLEK (11–15 lat) Wesoły, energiczny chłopak. Rola z tekstem.

Preferujemy dziecięcych aktorów z doświadczeniem przed kamerą lub scenicznym.

SARKOMERA (18–35 lat) Alter ego Matyldy w świecie fantasy. Postać inspirowana Conanem Barbarzyńcą, dlatego poszukujemy osoby o sportowej, umięśnionej sylwetce.

MIREK (45–75 lat) Ciepły, serdeczny woźny. Dobry duch szkoły, do której uczęszczają bohaterowie.

Prosimy o przesłanie:
* zdjęcia twarzy,
* wizytówki aktorskiej lub demo,
z dopiskiem, na którą rolę się zgłaszacie, na adres: julia.klijer@gmail.com
Do zobaczenia!

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

🟣 TEATR MŁODEGO WIDZA Z WOLIMIERZA POSZUKUJE AKTORÓW! 🟣
🎭 Dołącz do zespołu teatralnego i występuj w spektaklach dla dzieci i młodzieży w całej Polsce!

🔹 KOGO SZUKAMY?
✔️ aktorów z doświadczeniem
✔️ lub młodych, utalentowanych osób, które chcą nauczyć się zawodu aktora

🔹 OFERUJEMY:
✅ pracę od połowy września 2026 do czerwca@ 2027(z możliwością przedłużenia)
✅ granie 2 tygodnie w miesiącu (pon–pt)
✅ atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie
✅ spektakle w całej Polsce
✅ transport i noclegi w trasie
✅ profesjonalne szkolenia z teatru formy (maski, lalki)
✅ rozwój artystyczny w kreatywnym zespole

🔹 OCZEKUJEMY:
🎙️ dobrej dykcji
🎯 dyspozycyjności na próbach we Wrocławiu od sierpnia
🎭 zaangażowania i odpowiedzialności

📧 Wyślij CV ze zdjęciem:
teatrmlodegowidza@o2.pl
📞 Kontakt: 600 236 767

📌 Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi kandydatami

items.text:
🎬✨ CASTING CALL – COASTAL ACADEMY CHRISTMAS SPECIAL! ✨🎄

Calling all young performers across Essex and the surrounding areas! 🌟

Have you ever wanted to experience what it’s like to be part of a professional film set? Now’s your chance!

StandUP Productions is opening the doors to actors aged 11–25 for a special one-off episode of our original YouTube teen drama series, Coastal Academy – inspired by classic British school dramas and packed with festive twists! 🎄🎥

⭐ Full day of filming
⭐ Cameras, costumes, make-up and catering
⭐ Work alongside a fantastic cast of young performers
⭐ Gain valuable on-set experience
⭐ Build confidence and develop your screen acting skills
⭐ Capture footage perfect for your acting reel and portfolio
⭐ Ideal for actors wanting training, experience or simply a chance to perform

Whether you’re an experienced actor or looking to gain more practice in front of the camera, we’d love to welcome you onto set for an immersive filming experience unlike any other.

🎬 Coastal Academy Christmas Special
📅 26th August 2026
⏰ 8am–3pm
📍 Maltings witham - Essex
🎭 Ages 11–25

Don’t wait for opportunity… create it. ⭐

📩 To book your place, email dramaschool@standupuk.com or WhatsApp 07857 940008.

 Or 

Follow this link 
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf0aX0RNxhVz83VxdJmJqvRXcq0zw3EzPoh8lIFwLZbOArF6g/viewform?usp=share_link&ouid=101039691088988050655

items.text:
**CASTING PREGNANT WOMEN - BISCUIT COMMERCIAL **🍪

**Anna McAuley Casting is seeking Northern** **women who are currently pregnant for a biscuit brand commercial.**

We’re specifically looking for: women, friends and sisters who are 6 to 8 months pregnant.

**Filming: **22 / 23 / 24 July (Manchester) Paid opportunity.

Applicants to be based in Manchester, Leeds, Liverpool and surrounding areas. No previous acting experience needed.

Please apply with full name, location, selfie to:** hello@mcauleycasting.com **with the subject: ‘Biscuit Commercial - Pregnant Women’

CASTING CALL – PAID COMMERCIAL SHOOT 🎬

Looking for an early 20s East Asian woman, for a non-speaking role in a restaurant commercial to play a university student. 

📍 Downtown Vancouver
📅 June 30, 2026
⏰ Early morning call time
💰 $100/hour
🕒 Approx. 2–3 hours of work

Please send me a DM with a recent photo and contact information if interested.

Thanks!

Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be holding Summer Open Casting Calls for Non-Union Actors with Acting Experience, Resumes, Headshots and Reels in New England for PAID Commercial work!

Seeking a Diverse Cast of Characters to represent who we are as Americans to portray Medical Professionals and Patients!

I have cast 90 Actors in 9 PSA Commercials and will be doing more this Summer and Fall!!

For details on the Casting Calls please send an email to:

JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.com

📍 NOW CASTING – Detroit, Michigan
We’re looking for talented, passionate, and emotionally expressive actors to join the cast of COUCH TALK.

This is a character-driven urban drama centered on friendship, truth, betrayal, healing, and the difficult conversations that change lives.

We’re seeking actors who can bring authenticity, vulnerability, and powerful performances to the screen.

**HI EVERYONE! I AM LOOKIG FOR THE FOLLOWING CREW FOR A SHORT FILM IN BOSTON MA!**
* **First Assistant Director**
* **Production Manager**
* **Head of Set Design**

**COMP: PROFIT SHARING / DEFERRED PAY**

**EMAIL: LeeMonte617@gmail.com **with your NAME & POSITION of interest on subject header. 

**STORY:** A couple in love argue over a major life decision when the boyfriend, believing he's going to die, brings up the strange occurrences that alludes to his death; in essence, just as they find love, the unthinkable and unbelievable happens. 

**Days of Production: **5 Days

**Pre-Production: **July 2026 - September 2026** ( **can change** )**

**Production: Fall ( **September / October 2026 **)**

**Location: **Massachusetts **(** Boston / Greater Boston **)**

**Team Size: **15 - 20

items.text:
🎬 Darstellerin / Model für Musikvideo gesucht! (NRW, gerne auch Newcomer)

Hey zusammen! 👋

Ich bin Max Konstanty :) Für den Dreh meines kommenden Musikvideos sind mein Label (END BUILD BEGIN) und ich auf der Suche nach einem weiblichen Gesicht für die Kamera. Anhand des hier gepostete Videos könnt ihr euch ein Bild von Sound und Look machen. Die neue Single (Auskopplung aus meinem Album "Luxus", das Ende August erscheint) schicken wir euch vor dem Dreh zu.

Das Projekt:
Es gibt keine komplexe Storyline oder Dialoge – der Fokus liegt komplett auf ästhetischen, cinematischen Shots, die die Stimmung des Songs einfangen. Du musst keine Texte lernen oder unbedingt Schauspielerfahrung mitbringen. Es geht um Ausstrahlung, Mimik, Posen und coole Bilder.

Wen wir suchen:

Alter: ca. 20 bis 40 Jahre

Größe: bis ca. 1,75 m

Erfahrung ist nicht zwingend notwendig!

Die Rahmendaten:

📍 Location: Niederrhein

📅 Datum: Juli/August 2026

💰 Vergütung: 200 Euro für 5-6 Stunden Dreh plus Verpflegung.

Interesse?
Dann schreib mir einfach eine kurze PN! Bitte schick direkt Folgendes mit:

1–2 aktuelle Fotos von dir, dein Alter, Größe und ungefähren Wohnort (Handybilder reichen völlig aus)

(Optional) Link zu deinem Instagram, falls du magst.

Wir freuen uns auf deine Pn und beantworte auch gerne vorab alle Fragen :) Vielen Dank.

OPŁATA 50 ZŁ ZA PÓŁ GODZINY — PROSTE ZADANIE AKTORSKIE!
WARSZAWA! Szukam mężczyzny (45-70 lat) do krótkiego nagrania DZISIAJ na YouTube w stylu prank.

Co jest do zrobienia? Nic strasznego — trzeba będzie tylko trochę pokrzyczeć i udawać bardzo przestraszonego (krótka, dynamiczna scenka). Szukam kogoś z dystansem do siebie!

Możliwość stałej współpracy na co dzień. Proszę o SMS pod numer +48795066177. Proszę od razu wysyłać swoje zdjęcia :)

items.text:
‼️UWAGA‼️
📸 Fotografowie, filmowcy, makijażystki, stylistki, twórcy internetowi i osoby kreatywne – zapraszam do współpracy!

Prowadzę Studio Fotograficzne i Wizerunkowe od 17 lat. Obecna przestrzeń na Junikowie, przy ul. Frezjowej 12 na os. Kwiatowym, działa już od 4 lat i jest miejscem, w którym powstają sesje zdjęciowe, materiały wideo oraz projekty związane z budowaniem wizerunku.

Musisz wyjść z domu, żeby skupić się na pracy? Dzieci nie dają Ci chwili spokoju? Nie masz odpowiedniego miejsca do realizacji swoich pomysłów? Potrzebujesz inspiracji, nowych kontaktów lub kreatywnego otoczenia?
Być może właśnie znalazłeś swoje miejsce.
Do dyspozycji jest 72 m² @przestrzeni studyjnej, stworzonej z myślą o pracy twórczej. Dodatkowym atutem jest przestrzeń ogrodowa przy studio, idealna do sesji plenerowych, oraz wygodny parking bez problemów z parkowaniem – zarówno dla Ciebie, jak i Twoich klientów.

Przez 17 lat pracy w branży zdobyłem doświadczenie, którym chętnie się podzielę. Jestem otwarty na wymianę pomysłów, wspólne projekty, wzajemne wsparcie, budowanie portfolio, pozyskiwanie klientów oraz współdzielenie kosztów prowadzenia przestrzeni.

Nie szukam pracowników. Szukam ludzi z pasją, którzy chcą tworzyć, rozwijać się i współpracować w przyjaznej atmosferze.
📍 Studio Fotograficzne i Wizerunkowe – 72 m² 📍 Junikowo – os. Kwiatowe 📍 ul. Frezjowa 12
Jeżeli chcesz działać w miejscu, gdzie kreatywność spotyka się z doświadczeniem i dobrą energią – zapraszam do kontaktu.
Paulinalupa.com 
663 767 676

items.text:
**CASTING CALL! **We are looking for leading cast roles in commutable distance to Portsmouth for our annual pantomime - this year is Pinocchio! Produced in-house and performed alongside a cast of local child actors, this year's production aims to be the most fun and accessible panto in Portsmouth! 

 

**Details of roles, dates and auditions: **[https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting](https://www.groundlings.co.uk/pinocchio-casting)

 

We're a community led theatre and as such cast members will be expected to work alongside young people, children and our volunteers - and look to have fun in the process!

 

For consideration, please submit a self tape including requested audition scenes and songs on the link above, indicating the specific role you’re applying for by 18 June 2026 to casting@groundlings.co.uk

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'THE PANTOMIME ADVENTURES OF Νγγζια ល PAID ACTING ROLES We are looking for 4 key lead roles in our annual Christmas Pantomime! If you are talented musical theatre performer- ameatur or professional we are looking for you! A ditzy dame? A cunning villian? A sweet heroine? A lonely toymaker? See link in our post to find out more! Groundlings ndlingsTheatre,Portsmouth Theatre, Groundlings THIATH'

HEJ, HEJ❤️
Kochani, nowa ekipa, nowe postaci czekają - AKTORZY I AKTORKI POSZUKIWANI! 🌺

Masz dyplom szkoły aktorskiej, filmowej lub teatralnej? Do serialu realizowanego we Wrocławiu szukamy aktorek i aktorów do głównych ról odcinkowych!

⭐️Stawka: 3000 zł za 3 dni zdjęciowe
⭐️Zapewniamy hotel i zwrot kosztów dojazdu
⭐️Elastyczne terminy zdjęć
⭐️Świetna atmosfera i nowa ekipa

Prześlijcie swoje zgłoszenie, a znajdziemy postać i termin ☺️☺️

items.text:
POSZKUKIWANI STATYŚCI DO SCENY IMPREZY- ŁÓDŹ- 30M FESTIWAL!!
Cześć! Szukają STATYSTÓW do ciekawego i spontanicznego projektu realizowanego w ramach Festiwalu 30m w Łodzi. Zdjęcia już w ten weekend!

🗓️ZDJĘCIA odbędą się w terminie 27 lub 28 czerwca (w trakcie ustaleń).

👥Szukamy młodzieży w wieku 20-28 lat

📺Na czym polega KONKURS? Realizujemy krótki metraż na taśmie 16mm bez żadnych cięć, po jednym dublu i bez procesu postprodukcji, a efekt pracy będziemy mogli dopiero zobaczyć podczas gali razem z innymi uczestnikami tegorocznej edycji.

🎞️ Film opowiada o skomplikowanej relacji trójki młodych ludzi, w której tłumione uczucia i niewypowiedziane słowa prowadzą do konfrontacji podczas imprezy.

🎬Scena do której szukamy statystów to SCENA IMPREZY- gdzie dochodzi do spięć między głównymi bohaterami. 

💲OFERTA NON PROFIT!! Oczywiście zapewnimy przyjemną atmosferę na planie i przekąski.

🙏Będziemy wdzięczni za każdy komentarz, propozycję, czy kontakt. Zachęcam do kontaktu przez wiadomość prywatną, komentarz lub e-mail j.wiech@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

Dzięki!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people and text that says '1ท6 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI DO SCENY IMPREZY- ŁÓDŹ!! 30m FESTIWAL KIEDY? 27 ub lub 28 CZERWCA Szukamy osób w wieku 20-28 lat kontakt: mail: J.wiec il-jwie@suden,ilmscebo.lo. lodz.p lub fb: Julia Muria Więch'

items.text:
It's all free guys... 

If anyone would like to learn more about acting for screen, this is the workshop to go to! 🫵

sharedPost.text:
Adders Film School is inviting young creatives aged 13–17 to an exclusive, interactive online masterclass. This live, hands-on workshop is designed to give you a genuine taste of the professional film industry.

Whether your passion lies in mastering screen presence or discovering how directors bring a script to life, this session will give you the tools to jumpstart your creative journey. This event offers you an opportunity to rehearse and act out a scene from an original script and get real-time feedback from our experts.

🤫 Shh, we're offering exclusive discounts and priority enrolment for our September intake to our attendees. Hurry and grab a seat by clicking the link in our bio!

#miltonkeynes #actingforscreen #teencreatives #moviebuffs🎬 #teenactivities #addersfilmschool

items.text:
*Please could you share with anyone you might know with weird football superstitions?!*

We're looking for people with Football based superstitions as new data shows 44% of UK fans engage in some form of football superstition and 3.7 million wear lucky pants while watching England! Do you know someone who has a pre-football ritual in hopes of their team scoring? Or someone who has to wear a certain pair of socks to a game? 

Ideally they’ll be happy being pictured and commenting on their unusual superstition!

Message me here or jackmcardle@hatch.group

topComments.text: My husband tells me not to look at the score when his team are playing 🤣

items.text:
NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ DZIŚ!
Lubisz gotować? Gotowanie to Twoja pasja?

Szukamy uczestników do nowego programu kulinarnego. Mile widziane są osoby, które po raz pierwszy chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerami.

Jeśli gotowanie sprawia Ci przyjemność, czekamy właśnie na Ciebie. 

Za udział w programie przewidziane jest wynagrodzenie. 

Na uczestników czekają nagrody!

Napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, a opowiem o szczegółach.

Zuza

📸 **NABÓR NA SESJĘ KIDWELL** 📸

Poszukujemy dzieci do udziału w plenerowej sesji zdjęciowej marki Kidwell.

 

📅 **Kiedy?**
29.06 – 03.07.2026 (poszukujemy dzieci dostępnych w tym przedziale czasowym – dokładny termin sesji będzie uzależniony od warunków pogodowych).

 

📍 **Gdzie?**
Lusowo (okolice Poznania, gm. Tarnowo Podgórne, woj. wielkopolskie)

 

👧👦 **Kogo szukamy?**
• chłopca o wzroście ok. 95 cm
• dziewczynki o wzroście ok. 95 cm

Jetzt schon auf die Sommerferien freuen!
🍉👓🧴🍦☀️🏝️

Mit ClarAct geht das 🌈☺️☺️

🐝Komm mit uns auf die Bühne und spiele deine Traumrolle!-🎭🧚🏻‍♀️🐼👮👑🏴‍☠️

Du hast Lust auf der Bühne zu stehen und deine eigene Geschichte zu schreiben und zu spielen? 

Dann bist du in unserem Schauspielworkshop in den Hamburger Sommerferien 2026 genau richtig ☺️🥳

Am Ende werden wir unser eigenes Stück mit Kostüm und allem Drum und Dran vor deinen Gästen auf unserer coolen Bühne präsentieren! 🎬🎭🕴️

Sei dabei und melde dich jetzt an und profitiere von unserem early bird Rabatt!🐥

📅 Termin: 27. und 28. Juli 2026 
  jeweils 10-13 Uhr 
🐥Jetzt mit Rabatt: 129,00€ statt 149,00€

👉 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: Link in der Bio
  www.claract.de

🚨 Die Plätze sind begrenzt – melde dich am besten direkt an!
Geeignet für Kinder von 5-12 Jahren

Bei Fragen melde dich jederzeit bei mir!😊
Ich freue mich auf dich 🥳

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — FREE ZONE**

We are looking for a **Persian-speaking woman** for a small voice-over role in FREE ZONE — a feature documentary about Exarcheia in Athens.

The role is **three sentences in Persian.** Recording can be done remotely on an iPhone — no studio, no professional equipment needed.

FREE ZONE is a DFFB Abschlussfilm, RBB Leuchtstoff funded, and dok.münchen pitch winner, heading for festival premieres!

If you're interested or know someone who might be — please message us or share. Every recommendation helps.

📩 [jasmine.alakari@gmail.com](mailto:jasmine.alakari@gmail.com)

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE (ITALIAN SPEAKER)
A STRANGE DAY (SHORT FILM)

We are currently casting the lead role for A Strange Day, an independent short film developed between Germany and Italy and intended for international film festivals.

Looking for a young Italian football player—or someone who could convincingly be one—for the lead role 

This project is fully self funded by the crew members so unfortunately this is an UNPAID role

ROLE: GUIDO CAPPELLI 

Male | Playing Age 16–18

Guido is a 17-year-old Italian football player participating in an international youth tournament in Germany.

While his teammates focus on winning, Guido gradually becomes fascinated by the mysterious forests surrounding the sports complex. What begins as curiosity slowly turns into a journey through adolescence, imagination, isolation and self-discovery.

We are looking for someone with a natural screen presence and emotional authenticity rather than extensive acting experience.

REQUIREMENTS

✓ Fluent Italian speaker (required)

✓ Playing age 16–18

✓ Athletic build

✓ Football experience is welcome but not essential

✓ Strong expressive presence on camera

✓ Based in Berlin, or in nearest areas of Germany

ABOUT THE FILM

A Strange Day is a coming-of-age mystery inspired by youth football culture, personal memories, and the visual tradition of Italian Giallo cinema.

The film explores a universal feeling many people experienced growing up: the moment when you begin to drift away from the group around you and start searching for your own place in the world.

SHOOTING

Germany, Berlin

August 2026

TO APPLY

Please send:

• Headshot

• Recent photos

• Age and city where you based now

• Acting experience (if any)

• Football experience (if any)

Subject:

GUIDO CASTING – Your Name

Contact:

Hannahrynevich@gmail.com

items.text: MONDAY - NEW ROUTINE - £3! 🤯

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

sharedPost.text:
The Walk of life: Audition call
Synopsis:

The Walk of Life is based on the book of the same name by Bill Booth and adapted by Sharon Colpman and the Tag Team Writers II; it was further abridged by Kevin Foott.

It is the story of the life of Bill and his wife Cathy and the events that shaped them over the course of their marriage together, culminating in the sad passing of Bill’s beloved Cathy.

The play is going to take the form of an immersive theatrical experience at Studio Beyond during the Liverpool Fringe on 7th October 2026 and will be produced by Sharon Colpman @MIW Productions and Directed by Kevin Foott.

 

We are looking for a number of roles for the piece which include:

BILL:​​​Will play Bill at all stages of his adolescent and adult life.

​​​Male; acting age between 30 – 45

 

The BOOTHIES:​Four children playing the parts of Young Bill and his three brothers; ​​​ALAN, JOHN and RAY.

​​​Males; acting age 8 – 11

TEENAGE

CADETS:​​Two young actors playing Bill’s fellow cadets CLIFFY and KENNY

​​​Males; acting age 15 – 17

(If we are unable to identify four children, we will look to identify 3 young actors to play the roles of ‘The Boothies’; with BILL playing the other.)

CATHY’S

MATES:​​Two female actors playing Cathy’s mates/co-workers RUBY and ​​​​SHEILA

​​​Female; acting age 25 – 35

BILL’S MUM:​A strong working-class character.

​​​Female: acting age 65 – 75

 

JANE:​​​Bill and Cathy’s daughter, a female actor who potentially resembles ​​​Cathy.

​​​Female: acting age 25 – 35

 Please note, apart from Bill, these roles are not large. 

Rehearsals will take place at Studio Beyond.

If you are interested in getting involved in this exciting project please send a copy of your CV or spotlight link to Kevin Foott, kwfs@msn.com; make sure your contact details include your telephone number. Payment is Profit Share

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LIVERPOOL 🎬

RED BRICK WAR

We are currently casting for a professionally produced Proof of Concept film for an upcoming Liverpool-based action thriller.

RED BRICK WAR is a gritty crime and action story set in Liverpool, centred around former Tier 1 operator Sonny Doyle, who returns home after his teenage nephew is left in a coma following a brutal gang attack. What begins as a hunt for those responsible quickly uncovers a far larger network involving organised crime, corruption and private military contractors operating in the shadows.

We are currently seeking actors for several principal and supporting roles, including:

• Male – 35-45 (Lead)
• Female – 30-45
• Male - 30-45 ( x3 )
• Male – 18-25
• Female – 18-25
• Supporting and featured speaking roles
• Background performers and extras
• Production specialists

Filming will take place in and around Liverpool.

This Proof of Concept is being produced to support feature film development, funding and industry pitching.

Whilst this stage of the project is unpaid, successful applicants will receive:

• Professional footage suitable for showreels
• Professional photography and behind-the-scenes content
• Full screen credit
• The opportunity to be considered for future paid production roles should the feature move into full production

Experience is welcome but not essential for all roles.

To apply, please send:

• Headshot
• Acting CV (if available)
• Showreel (if available)
• Contact details

📧 info@redbrickwar.co.uk

@redbrickwarfilm

Liverpool, UK

RED BRICK WAR

Brotherhood. Loyalty. Consequence.

SOME DEBTS ARE PAID IN BLOOD.

items.text:
Looking for 1 actor and 1 actress who’d be down to help me test out a new lens for an upcoming film.

Nothing too crazy — we’d just meet at a park and shoot a few cinematic scenes/moments to see how the lens looks. This is perfect for anyone who wants some film-style footage they might be able to use for their reel or socials.

Trying to give actors a chance to get footage that looks like it belongs in a real film, while I test the lens and build out some visuals.

If you’re interested, send me a headshot/photo and any reel or acting clips if you have them, best form of contact is IG: mateokbernard.

items.text:
Möchtest du Kontakte in der Unterhaltungsbranche knüpfen? Dann ist IndustryMe genau das Richtige für dich. IndustryMe ist eine Plattform, die sich exklusiv an Personen richtet, die sich weltweit mit anderen aus allen Bereichen der Film- und Unterhaltungsbranche vernetzen möchten. Egal, ob du Schauspieler, Filmemacher, Produzent, Casting-Direktor, Musiker oder Crew-Mitglied bist oder hinter den Kulissen in den Bereichen Recht, Marketing oder Business arbeitest – IndustryMe.net ist der ideale Ort für neue Kontakte.

Melde dich noch heute an und knüpfe Verbindungen, die deine Karriere voranbringen! #IndustryMe

Hello everyone,

I’m excited to announce that I’m doing picture auditions for a KFC TV advert and I’m looking for everyday people to be part of it!  

Body Type & Look  

- A variety of body sizes and styles (note: the client isn’t considering larger frames for this particular project).  
- Unique features are celebrated — things like birthmarks, gapped teeth, or anything that makes you stand out.  
- Most importantly, I want real, relatable faces that feel like everyday South Africans.  

Applicants should be based in or around Johannesburg.  

If you’re confident, not camera shy, and have features that make you uniquely you, please send your recent studio pictures to my WhatsApp: 078 121 4807.  

@highlight

• Monday 6th July

items.text:
Short student movie from Croatia "The Last Days"
Dear all,

I am excited to share The Last Days, my graduation short fiction film, a project I have been working on for the past six months together with a wonderful creative and production team.

We have launched a crowdfunding campaign, and every contribution means a great deal to us.

Through the link below, you can find more information about the film, our team, cast, production costs, and what we are raising funds for. Any donation, no matter the amount, directly helps us complete the film and prepare it for its festival journey. The names of all donors will be included in the film’s closing credits.

The film needs to be fully edited by September 1, completed and ready for distribution by September 9, and we plan to submit it no later than September 12 to this year’s competitive short film programme Kockice at the Zagreb Film Festival. Fingers crossed we will see you there.

If you are not able to donate at the moment, sharing the campaign or following us on Instagram would also mean a lot: @posljednji_dani.film

All additional information is available through the link below.

Wishing everyone a wonderful summer, and thank you from the bottom of our hearts for every kind of support.
items.previewTitle: TheLastDays
items.previewDescription: Short student film based in Croatia. A father-daughter drama about care, resentment and letting go. photos by / Iva Lemo and Lukas Kamber
items.title: TheLastDays

Could Princess Ida be your next theatrical adventure? 👑

Join The Bentley for one of our Princess Ida Taster Sessions and discover what Gilbert & Sullivan is all about!

Whether you’re an experienced performer, a G&S enthusiast, or completely new to the stage, we’d love to welcome you. Meet our creative team, learn about the production, sing through some of Sullivan’s glorious music, and find out what being part of The Bentley is all about.

Our production of Princess Ida will be performed on 5th, 6th & 7th February 2027, and these taster evenings are the perfect opportunity to see if you’d like to get involved.

📅 Tuesday 30th June & Tuesday 7th July
🕢 7:30pm
📍 Allerton URC, Mather Avenue, Liverpool

Bring a friend, bring your voice, or simply bring your curiosity. We can’t wait to meet you! 🎶✨

items.text:
🎭 Ever fancied giving acting or improvisation a go?

I'm launching a brand new Adult Improvisation Class in Huyton, starting Sunday 5th July, and whether you've never stepped on stage before or you've acted in the past and want to sharpen your skills, you'll be very welcome.

I've spent nearly 20 years performing in improvised murder mysteries, and as co-owner of Alara Entertainment, improvisation has become a huge part of what I do. Every show is different, and thinking on your feet is a skill that's useful both on and off the stage.

These sessions will be relaxed, supportive, and packed with fun games and exercises designed to build confidence, creativity, quick thinking, and performance skills. No scripts, no pressure, and absolutely no experience required. And best of all, it's completely free of charge!

📍 An Hour For Others, Huyton
🕖 7:00pm every Sunday
📅 Starting Sunday 5th July

If you've been looking for a new hobby, want to meet new people, or simply fancy trying something different, come along and give it a go.

Drop me a message if you'd like more information or to reserve your place!

items.summary:
🎭 Ever fancied giving acting or improvisation a go?

I'm launching a brand new Adult Improvisation Class in Huyton, starting Sunday 5th July, and whether you've never stepped on stage before or you've acted in the past and want to sharpen your skills, you'll be very welcome.

I've spent nearly 20 years performing in improvised murder mysteries, and as co-owner of Alara Entertainment, improvisation has become a huge part of what I do. Every show is different, and thinking on your feet is a skill that's useful both on and off the stage.

These sessions will be relaxed, supportive, and packed with fun games and exercises designed to build confidence, creativity, quick thinking, and performance skills. No scripts, no pressure, and absolutely no experience required. And best of all, it's completely free of charge!

📍 An Hour For Others, Huyton
🕖 7:00pm every Sunday
📅 Starting Sunday 5th July

If you've been looking for a new hobby, want to meet new people, or simply fancy trying something different, come along and give it a go.

Drop me a message if you'd like more information or to reserve your place!

items.text:
Do lipcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról: 

1. Arek (18) – pogodny 18-latek spragniony przygód.   

Daty: 06 i 10.07
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

2. Kumpel (18) – dobry kolega Arka. Trochę nerd (może być w okularach)

Data: 06.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Łysy (29) – Chłopak Dagmary, wiecznie o nią zazdrosny. Typ osiedlowego drecha, przemocowca. Wybuchowy. [Jest łysy].  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!

Data: 07.07 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

4. Bramkarz (37) – bramkarz pracujący w klubie. Stara się dobrze wykonywać swoją robotę. Jest otwarty na współpracę z policją. Dobra sylwetka.

Data: 07.07 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

5. Diler (37) – Gość załatwia towar mniejszym dilerom. Zgrywa twardziela.

Data: 07.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

6. Iwan (39) – niebezpieczny gangster powiązany z poznańską mafią narkotykową. [Postać pojawia się ponownie w tym sezonie] KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY!!!

Data: 07.07
Stawka: 500 zl netto / 532

7. Radosław Domagała (39) – materialista i cwaniak, dla pieniędzy dał się wciągnąć w gangsterkę. Dobra sylwetka.

Data: 06.07
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

8.Andrzej (44) –  tata Arka. Facet z zasadami, umysł inżyniera. Oddany rodzinie.

Data: 06.07 i. 10.07
Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku
8. Informację kiedy ostatnio grali Państwo w serialu „Gliniarze” 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

Projekt dla aplikacji zdrowotnej (Warszawa)
Szukamy modelki 40+ (podobna z referensem - proszę zobaczyć zdjęcia niżej ✅🎉✅🎉) 

do nagrań wideo dla aplikacji mobilnej dedykowanej zdrowiu szyi i kręgosłupa (profilaktyka oraz łagodzenie bólów pleców). Zadaniem modelki będzie zaprezentowanie ćwiczeń rozciągających i zwiększających mobilność (łącznie 33 lekkie, bezpieczne ćwiczenia).

🗓️ Harmonogram i lokalizacja

 Miejsce: Warszawa

 Próby: 2 niepełne dni (po 6 godzin) w okresie 01.07 – 05.07 (dokładne daty do ustalenia).

 Dni zdjęciowe: 3 dni w przedziale 04.07 – 12.07 (dokładne daty w trakcie potwierdzania).

💰 Wynagrodzenie i prawa (Netto)

 Dzień zdjęciowy: 2220 PLN / 600 USD za dzień

 Dzień prób: 775 PLN / 210 USD za dzień

 CAŁKOWITY BUDŻET: 2220 USD 

netto (kwota obejmuje dni zdjęciowe, próby oraz pełne przeniesienie praw do wizerunku).

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres e-mail: tatianamakhdi@gmail.com

W wiadomości prosimy podać następujące informacje:

1. Imię i nazwisko

2. Wiek

3. Wzrost

4. Numer telefonu

Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć:

 Dodatkowy atut: Jeśli posiadasz wideo, na którym ćwiczysz lub uprawiasz sport, koniecznie je podeślij!

items.text:
Film Spring Open zaprasza!

DROGIE AKTORKI!

A gdyby te wakacje stały się początkiem nowego rozdziału w Waszej karierze ?

Po krótkiej kursowej przerwie wracamy z elektryzującą wiadomością! I tym razem mamy coś wyjątkowego – stworzonego specjalnie dla Was.

„SIŁA TWOICH ZASOBÓW” – edycja dla aktorek 19–22 lipca 2026 Przesieka | Karkonosze

Nowa formuła warsztatu skrojona pod wakacyjny czas już na Was czeka!

To będzie niezwykłe połączenie rozwoju zawodowego i osobistego, powrotu do ciała, zatrzymania się i złapania oddechu. Bo wiemy, jak łatwo w naszej branży zgubić kontakt ze sobą – między castingami, planami filmowymi i codziennym pędem.

I teraz najważniejsze…

Jak połączyć:

-jogę,naturę i regenerację

-casting i pracę nad materiałami aktorskimi

-markę osobistą i świadomy wizerunek

-wyciszenie i budowanie odporności psychicznej?

Brzmi jak plan idealny?

Stworzyłyśmy miejsce, w którym to wszystko spotyka się w harmonii. W cudownej, malowniczej Przesiece, pośród karkonoskiej natury.

A jeśli dodamy do tego trzy prowadzące – absolutne ekspertki w swoich dziedzinach:

Julię Popkiewicz, Izabelę Gałan oraz Katarzynę Gryciuk-Krzywdę

…to pozostaje już tylko jedno:

skontaktować się z nami i zarezerwować miejsce.

Mamy przeczucie graniczące z pewnością, że nasza skrzynka rozgrzeje się do czerwoności!

Dlatego nie zwlekajcie.

Jeśli czujesz, że potrzebujesz odzyskać energię, spojrzeć na swoją karierę z nowej perspektywy i spędzić kilka dni w inspirującym kobiecym gronie — „Siła Twoich Zasobów” czeka właśnie na Ciebie.

Zapraszamy do zapisów!

biuro@filmspringopen.eu 

Szczegóły znajdziecie na naszej stronie:

https://filmspringopen.eu/kurs/sila-twoich-zasobow-edycja-dla-aktorek/

W razie pytań pozostajemy do dyspozycji mailowo

Do zobaczenia w Karkonoszach!
items.title: SIŁA TWOICH ZASOBÓW – edycja dla aktorek - Film Spring Open

items.text:
Urgently seeking a male-identifying actor for "Cryptophasia"! If interested, please contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com asap!

All details at: [[https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions)](https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExV3RXeUh4bEozcTA4WGZEMnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wuYcyKwdVXjka-8n85mtcPepsYDaVlZl5AhJEWK7jZmcpT2zQ4DYs9KYpIg_aem_JXKrh2NpoDhdGHQn3VfNXw)

**Dates:**

Rehearsals will be held June 30th through July 18th on select weekdays and Saturdays.  Rehearsal schedule is flexible for this role.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances: **July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

Compensation: $100 stipend plus portion of profits

**Show Synopsis:**

Cryptophasia (N)- The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Description:**

Unk/Dr. Truman (Male-identifying, 18+ to play 30s-60s)- Actor will double as Missy's goofy, somewhat oblivious father and Anna and Bella's caring but emotionally guarded pediatrician.

items.text:
✨ Santorini | Wedding / Engagement / Couple Sessions | June 24–29 ✨

Dreaming of a photo or video session in Santorini? 🤍

One of the most picturesque and romantic places in the world — white architecture, dramatic cliffs, breathtaking sunsets, and incredible natural light 🌅

We’ll be on the island June 24–29 as Moffy Digital, offering:

– wedding sessions

– engagement shoots

– romantic / lifestyle sessions

– photo + video (cinematic storytelling)

🎬 We work with professional equipment and cinema cameras
🌍 We’ve filmed internationally, including Madeira, Iceland, Jordan, and Norway
✨ Our style is film-inspired — capturing real emotions in a timeless way

💡 A rare opportunity — since we’re already on location, no travel or transport costs apply, which means a special offer in a top-tier destination.

Maybe you’ll be in Santorini at that time? ☀️

Or maybe it’s the perfect moment to finally create something you’ve been dreaming of?

📩 Send us a message here or on our Instagram

Portfolio Moffy Digital:

https://linktr.ee/mdp.weddings?

Outdoor session:

https://moffydigital.pixieset.com/adakrystian-plener/

See you in Santorini 🤍

Moffy Digital team

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SOMEPLACE, NOT HOME SHORT FILM IDENTITY & BELONGING MARA FEMALE 21 A WITTY, CONFIDENT YOUNG WOMAN WORKING ALONGSIDE HE PROTAGONIST. MARA BRINGS WARMTH, HUMOUR AND HONESTY INTOHIS ISOLATED WORLD. SHE OBSERVANT, GROUNDED AND CHALLENGES ARSH WHILE BECOMING ONE OF THE FEW PEOPLE WHO GENUINELY UNDERSTANDS HIM. ARCHIE MALE| 25 CHARISMATIC UNSETTLING FIGURE WHO INTRODUCES HE PROTAGONIST INTO WORLD DISGUISED AS BELONGING. ARCHIE IS CONFIDENT PERSUASIVE AND MAGNETIC. HE IS NOT OPENLY THREATENING. HIS DANGER COMES FROM HOW EASILY HE MAKES HARMFUL IDEAS SEEM NORMAL. 125833@metfimstudernts.c.uk. SHORT SCENE SELF WILL BE SENT To YOU SHOOTING FROM 29th'

items.text: Calling actors: Mary is casting. This women-led surreal psychological short follows a young woman as an interview meant to reclaim her story begins to spiral into something invasive and unsettling. We’re looking for thoughtful, collaborative performers excited by bold independent work. Send your headshot, resume/reel, and availability to cassiebeddor@gmail.com. Please note that this is unpaid and is expenses only.

topComments.text:
Where is this based? Interested in Allison .
Is there a script for seem a quick video ?
No pay no respect for actors 🚩

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of text that says 'CASTING!!! We're re casting Mary, a surreal psychological short film about image, control, and what happens when the act of being seen becomes something invasive. This is α women-written, women-directed, women- produced independent short, and we're looking for grounded, expressive actors excited to help bring this unsettling world to life. Please email cassiebeddor@gmail.com with your headshot, resume/reel, and availability and the role you are applying for in the subject line'

May be an image of text that says 'AVAILABLE ROLES: : PRINCIPAL CAST AND MARY PLAYING AGE: LATE 20S- EARLY 30S ROLE SIZE: LEAD A SOCIAL MEDIA FIGURE WRITER TRYING to REGAIN CONTROL OF HER PUBLIC IMAGE AFTER A PUBLIC DIVORCE AND CHEATING SCANDAL. MARY BEGINS COMPOSED AND GUARDED, BUT BECOMES INCREASINGLY UNSETTLED AS INTERVIEW TURNS INVASIVE AND SURREAL. ALLISON PLAYING AGE: MID 40S ROLE SIZE: SUPPORTING AN EXPERIENCED INTERVIEWER/JOURNALIST WHO ARRIVES AT MARY'S HOME WITH WARMTH, CONFIDENCE, AND A CLEAR AGENDA. CHARMING ON THE SURFACE, BUT INCREASINGLY RUTHLESS IN PURSUIT OF A MORE SENSATIONAL STORY.'

May be an image of text that says 'SMALL ROLES/DAYPLAYERS MAKEUP ARTIST PLAYING AGE:30-50 ROLE SIZE: SMALL SUPPORTING PART OF THE INTERVIEW CREW. ADJUSTS MARY'S APPEARANCE FOR THE CAMERA. ASSISTANT PLAYING AGE: 20-5- ROLE SIZE: SMALL SUPPORTING ALLISON'S ASSISTANT, PRESENT DURING THE INTERVIEW SETUP AND PRODUCTION. CAMERA OPERATOR / CAMERAMAN PLAYING AGE: OPEN ROLE SIZE: FEATURED SUPPORTING OPERATES THE INTERVIEW CAMERA AND RESPONDS to ALLISON'S CUES FOR BUILDING THE SENSE THAT MARY IS BEING WATCHED AND CAPTURED. PHOTOGRAPHER PLAYING AGE: OPEN ROLE SIZE: FEATURED SUPPORTING TAKES PHOTOGRAPHS DURING THE INTERVIEW AND OUTSIDE MARY'S HOME. ADDS to THE PRESSURE, SPECTACLE, AND PUBLIC SCRUTINY SURROUNDING MARY.'

May be an image of text that says 'FEATURED BACKGROUND & ENSEMBLE INTERVIEW CREW MEMBERS NUMBER NEEDED: 3 PLAYING AGE: OPEN CREW MEMBERS WHO SET UP LIGHTS, EQUIPMENT, CAMERAS, AND PROPS INSIDE MARY'S HOME. THEY SHOULD FEEL BUSY, EFFICIENT, AND SLIGHTLY INVASIVE. (COULD DOUBLE UP WITH SOME OF PAPARAZZI NUMBER NEEDED: OUR CREW?) PLAYING AGE: OPEN PHOTOGRAPHERS OUTSIDE MARY'S HOUSE AND/OR VISIBLE DURING THE MEDIA FRENZY. THEY CREATE E EXTERNAL PRESSURE OF PUBLIC ATTENTION. FANS NUMBER NEEDED: 3-5 PLAYING AGE: TEENS to EARLY 20S A SMALL GROUP OF FANS WHO RECOGNISE MARY, TAKE PHOTOS, AND ESTABLISH HER PUBLIC VISIBILITY AT THE BEGINNING OF THE FILM.'

items.text:
*Please could you share with anyone you might know with weird football superstitions?!*

We're looking for people with Football based superstitions as new data shows 44% of UK fans engage in some form of football superstition and 3.7 million wear lucky pants while watching England! Do you know someone who has a pre-football ritual in hopes of their team scoring? Or someone who has to wear a certain pair of socks to a game? 

Ideally they’ll be happy being pictured and commenting on their unusual superstition!

Message me here or jackmcardle@hatch.group

sharedPost.text:
My name is José , and I am pleased to introduce our Piano & Voice Duo.
We are a versatile Mexican duo specializing in international music, including Pop, Jazz, Soft Rock, Soul, Latin, Bossa Nova, Country, and contemporary favorites. In addition to our elegant lounge and cocktail repertoire, we also perform upbeat party sets featuring dance hits and crowd favorites, creating a lively atmosphere for celebrations and entertainment events.

Please find below our promotional materials, including videos, repertoire, photos, and additional information:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1X0wUCnHfOdUo1BTtQLCiChPOp7bZTSk5?usp=drive_link

We are currently based in Mexico and available for international contracts starting July 1st, 2026.

Thank you for your time and consideration. We would be delighted to discuss any opportunities and provide additional information if required.

Kind regards,

José de Jesús Romo Muñoz

Piano & Voice Duo

Phone/WhatsApp: +52 473 137 1650

items.text:
🌟 فخامة الديكور العصري بين يديك | جملة ومفرق 🌟
​هل تبحث عن تحويل منزلك أو مكتبك إلى تحفة فنية بأحدث صيحات الديكور العالمي؟
Yuri Service تفتح لكم أبواب مستودعها الأكبر لتوفير أرقى تشكيلة من بدائل الخشب، الرخام، والحجر بأعلى جودة وأقوى الأسعار في السوق!
​نحن نجمع لك بين البيع بالجملة لأصحاب المشاريع والمحلات، والبيع بالمفرق للأفراد مع تشكيلة ألوان وموديلات (سعودي، تركي، سوري، وصيني) تلبي كل الأذواق.
​📐 تشكيلتنا ومنتجاتنا المتكاملة:
​بديل الرخام المميز: بمقاسات ملكية ضخمة 122 \times 280\text{ cm} ومقاسات متنوعة مثل 60 \times 60\text{ cm} تمنح المكان مظهراً متكاملاً بدون فواصل.
​بديل الخشب الفاخر: تشكيلة ألوان واسعة، بطول 280\text{ cm} وبعرض متنوع (12\text{cm}، 15\text{cm}، 20\text{cm}، و 60\text{cm}).
​بديل الحجر الحديث: بأشكال رائدة وألوان رملية وطبيعية ساحرة لعشاق التميز.
​إكسسوارات التشطيب والبراويز: تشكيلة ضخمة من البراويز، الزوايا العادية، وزوايا الإضاءة المخفية (لايت ستارت / Light Start) لداير السقف وداير الأرض، بالإضافة إلى المونتاجات الاحترافية المخصصة للتركيب السريع والمتين.
​🏪 تفضلوا بزيارتنا في المستودع!
​البضاعة متوفرة بكثرة وبخيارات لا تنتهي، ونفضل دائماً تشريفكم لنا في المحل/المستودع لتشاهدوا جودة الألوان والخامات على الطبيعة وتختاروا ما يناسبكم.
​📞 للطلب والاستفسار (واتساب أو اتصال مباشر):
​📱 01621660582
📍 Gelsenkirchen, Germany
​#Wandpaneele #AcousticPanels #بديل_الخشب #بديل_الرخام #بديل_الحجر #ديكورات_داخلية #تشطيبات #تجديد_منازل #ديكور_مودرن #لايت_ستارت #Wandverkleidung #Heimwerken #Interiordesign #MarmorOptik #Holzoptik #Gelsenkirchen #NordrheinWestfalen #

items.summary:
🌟 فخامة الديكور العصري بين يديك | جملة ومفرق 🌟
​هل تبحث عن تحويل منزلك أو مكتبك إلى تحفة فنية بأحدث صيحات الديكور العالمي؟
Yuri Service تفتح لكم أبواب مستودعها الأكبر لتوفير أرقى تشكيلة من بدائل الخشب، الرخام، والحجر بأعلى جودة وأقوى الأسعار في السوق!
​نحن نجمع لك بين البيع بالجملة لأصحاب المشاريع والمحلات، والبيع بالمفرق للأفراد مع تشكيلة ألوان وموديلات (سعودي، تركي، سوري، وصيني) تلبي كل الأذواق.
​📐 تشكيلتنا ومنتجاتنا المتكاملة:
​بديل الرخام المميز: بمقاسات ملكية ضخمة 122 \times 280\text{ cm} ومقاسات متنوعة مثل 60 \times 60\text{ cm} تمنح المكان مظهراً متكاملاً بدون فواصل.
​بديل الخشب الفاخر: تشكيلة ألوان واسعة، بطول 280\text{ cm} وبعرض متنوع (12\text{cm}، 15\text{cm}، 20\text{cm}، و 60\text{cm}).
​بديل الحجر الحديث: بأشكال رائدة وألوان رملية وطبيعية ساحرة لعشاق التميز.
​إكسسوارات التشطيب والبراويز: تشكيلة ضخمة من البراويز، الزوايا العادية، وزوايا الإضاءة المخفية (لايت ستارت / Light Start) لداير السقف وداير الأرض، بالإضافة إلى المونتاجات الاحترافية المخصصة للتركيب السريع والمتين.
​🏪 تفضلوا بزيارتنا في المستودع!
​البضاعة متوفرة بكثرة وبخيارات لا تنتهي، ونفضل دائماً تشريفكم لنا في المحل/المستودع لتشاهدوا جودة الألوان والخامات على الطبيعة وتختاروا ما يناسبكم.
​📞 للطلب والاستفسار (واتساب أو اتصال مباشر):
​📱 01621660582
📍 Gelsenkirchen, Germany
​#Wandpaneele #AcousticPanels #بديل_الخشب #بديل_الرخام #بديل_الحجر #ديكورات_داخلية #تشطيبات #تجديد_منازل #ديكور_مودرن #لايت_ستارت #Wandverkleidung #Heimwerken #Interiordesign #MarmorOptik #Holzoptik #Gelsenkirchen #NordrheinWestfalen #

items.text:
CASTING VOICE ACTOR

Title: Spilled Milk

Genre: Reality

Logline: In the heart of Denver’s nightlife, Spilled Milk follows a circle of bartenders, DJ’s, influencers, and club insiders whose friendships, romances, and rivalries collide both on and off the dance floor.
 
Role:
NARRATOR (male or female) Provides voiceover narration for the opening sequences and potentially future episodes.

Production Type: Reality TV Pilot

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Approx. 25 minutes

Compensation: Paid

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Send email with voiceover samples, we will send additional details and a brief audition script to those we want to hear more from.

Read more about the project here:

items.text:
I’m testing a new production workflow (using a laptop, tablet and phone) and need a live test scenario.

Any actors in the Springs / Pueblo area want to volunteer to be part of a short drama scene? You can keep it for your reel after we are done.

Need either a monologue, or 2 actors willing to do a short drama scene.

No pay but will be happy to provide a meal and pay for gas if it’s a trip. Trade for content for new and upcoming talent in the local area.

Message me please. Hoping for this weekend.

items.text: It’s been an increasingly busy summer so far! So we are currently still casting Huntrix and Princess character performers in Colorado Springs, Denver, and their surrounding areas! More details below 👑✨

sharedPost.text:
✨ CASTING CALL ✨
📍 Colorado Springs, Denver & surrounding areas

Due to an overwhelming increase in bookings — including frequent double and triple bookings — Once Upon A Dream is currently looking to expand our dream team of professional character performers!

As our cast continues to grow, we are actively working toward expanding authentic and diverse representation within these roles and are especially seeking performers of color for our Huntrix casting needs. Performers of Asian descent especially are strongly encouraged to apply!

Roles Needed: Rumi, Mira, Zoey, and all Saja boys.

What We’re Looking For:

✨ Comfortable performing in character and interacting with kids
✨ Great with children (experience with special needs children is a HUGE bonus!)
✨Acting skills (singing is a plus, but not required)
✨Flexible weekend availability
✨Reliable, enthusiastic, and passionate about creating magical memories

No professional training required — just heart, commitment, and a love for bringing stories to life. Training and costumes will be provided. 

💌 Interested in joining the magic?

• DM us via any of our social media platforms
• Text (719) 246-7591, or
• Email onceuponadream.co@outlook.com 

#coloradosprings #performers #theaterlife #characterperformers #castingcall

items.text:
Hi everyone,
Larius Productions are looking for 2 actors and an actress for their next production at the Bread and Roses theatre for a weeks run in  November. Profit share. This is a fun play with a degree of adult content surrounding relationships. So please⁸ keep this in mind when applying.

Characters of

 Edward (lawyer) An extroverted, aggressive, and somewhat sleazy criminal defense lawyer.playing age  35 to 45. Must have height  min  5ft 10

George  well-meaning but somewhat nerdy and controlling academic who teaches political philosophy. Playing age 35 to 45. must have  height min 5ft 10

Lydia, A kind-hearted but betrayed woman with a hardened exterior. Andrew’s fiancée and Edward’s ex-girlfriend. Playing age 35 to 45

Please email sonya_namik@yahoo.co.uk with submissions.. headshot, and spotlight link.

topComments.text: I am not on Spotlight quite yet but in process of joining later this year. Can I still apply?

Looking for a warm, natural actress/supporting artist to play the mum in a children’s music video for an 8-year-old artist.

Role: Mum / mother figure

Age range: 30–45

Shoot: London (Eltham), half day or full day

Fee: Paid, please send your rate

Scene: Short family moment where mum reacts proudly to her son losing his first tooth / growing up fast

Look: Warm, natural, stylish, family-friendly

Requirements: Comfortable working around children, able to sign release form, previous screen experience preferred

Please DM with:

.Recent photo

.Short acting/showreel clip if available

.Location

.Availability

.Half-day/full-day rate

items.text: Looking for a male model or actor to join me in the official music video for Dance Forever next week.🎶 No extensive experience needed — but good movement, handsome, and over 5’7. The role involves dancing in the chorus of a romantic, cinematic Latin music video. items.text:
🎬 **EXTRAS WANTED FOR A BRAND-NEW ITV PET SERIES!** 🐾

We're looking for friendly local people to be **extras** and help create a lively **village green crowd** for a brand-new ITV pet series filming at locations across the UK.

📍 Filming Locations & Dates: 

🐾 Virginia Water (Windsor Great Park) - Tuesday 30th June (1:00pm–5:00pm)

🐾 Horsham – Friday 3rd July 

🐾 Ipswich – Tuesday 7th July

🐾 Birmingham – Thursday 9th July

🐾 Bristol – Wednesday 15th July 

⏰ Filming times and exact locations for the remaining dates will be confirmed when you register your interest.

No acting experience or special story is needed - we're simply looking for enthusiastic people to help create a fun, vibrant village green atmosphere. 

Interested? Email petscasting@bandicoot.tv with your name, location and the filming date you'd like to attend to register your interest.

We'd love to have you involved! 🐶🐱

items.text:
**NATURAL LIGHT HEADSHOTS | NO SESSION FEE | CENTRAL LONDON - LIMITED AVAILABILITY (NEXT 2 WEEKS)**

*Casting-friendly, authentic natural light headshots that look and feel like you.*
* Shot by an agency-endorsed photographer with years of experience working with actors, dancers and models, filling a few gaps, support and direction to bring out your best.
* No session fee — only invest in the editing (£30/edit*) of what you want to use - weekday morning sessions on location central London.

*Interested - DM here or linked insta below (more work can be seen):*

Headshots - https://www.instagram.com/kensington_portraits/
Fashion - https://www.instagram.com/the_taikan/

*Selection made via contact sheet within a week
